animation.divide: Split the array into two halves and recurse deeper (Depth: {{depth}})
animation.merge_start: Prepare to merge two sorted sub-arrays (Return to depth: {{depth}})
animation.copy_element: Select the smaller value {{val}} and move to merged array
animation.remaining_left: Move the remaining left element {{val}} to merged array
animation.remaining_right: Move the remaining right element {{val}} to merged array
